reviews.comment:
Lugar para descansar un ratito, con mesas y bancos al aire libre.
La atención al público en YPF muy buena.
Tal vez porque no es temporada no hay que esperar mucho para ser atendido.

(Translated by Google)
A place to relax for a while, with tables and benches outdoors.
The customer service at YPF is very good.
Perhaps because it's not peak season, there's not a long wait to be served.

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para parar en la ruta Dos. Muy buen full. Surtido. Baños muy limpios. Muy buen parque para descansar a la sombra. Juegos para chicos.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop on Route 2. Excellent full service. Well-stocked. Very clean restrooms. Great park to relax in the shade. Playground for children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXemJTVDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atencion.
Le pongo una estrella porque use el baño.
El sabado 11/11/23 tipo 9 hs, con gran trafico en ruta 2, yendo a bs as de vacaciones, solo tenian una empleada atendiendo. Encima se puso a limpiar el vidrio y a revizar los fluidos, y todas las islas con autos esperando.
Como paso gran tiempo esperando , me fui y cargue en el ACA de Chascomus, donde, si habia personal.
Soy socio del ACA, es una verguenza que sola habia una playera.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster.
I'm giving it one star because I used the restroom. On Saturday, November 11, 2023, around 9:00 AM, with heavy traffic on Route 2, on my way to Buenos Aires for vacation, there was only one employee working. On top of that, she started cleaning the windshield and checking the fluids, while all the pump islands were full of cars waiting.
Since I waited so long, I left and filled up at the ACA in Chascomús, where there were actually staff.
I'm an ACA member, and it's a disgrace that there was only one attendant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbU1TbTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Como siempre el ACA cumple expectativas; baños limpios; por si no lo conocen, detras tienen un parque propio con comodidades para descansar y amplio estacionamiento entre los arboles.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the ACA meets expectations; clean bathrooms; in case you don't know it, behind it they have their own park with amenities for resting and ample parking among the trees.
